panel.title: Booking schedule
panel.selectSchedulePrompt: Please pick a departure date from the left to start booking.

voucher.label: Voucher code
voucher.invalid: Voucher is invalid or not applicable to this departure.

panel.authRequired: Please sign in before booking a tour.
panel.contactRequired: Please provide booker name and phone number.
panel.overCapacity: Selected guests exceed the remaining seats for this schedule.
panel.disclaimer: By clicking 'Book now' you agree to TravelViet's terms of service.

toast.createFailed: Could not create booking. Please retry.
toast.cancelFailed: Could not cancel booking. Please retry.

confirmation.errorMessage: Could not load booking details. Please retry.
confirmation.notFound: This booking does not exist or you do not have permission.
confirmation.title: Booking confirmed!
confirmation.subtitle: Booking code: {{code}}
confirmation.payNote: You will be redirected to the secure VNPay payment gateway.
confirmation.disclaimer: Thank you for booking with TravelViet. Our team will reach out to confirm soon.

toast.checkoutFailed: Could not start a VNPay session. Please retry.

paymentReturn.lookupFailedTitle: Could not match this payment to a booking
paymentReturn.lookupFailedMessage: We can't identify the booking from this payment session. Please check your bookings page.
paymentReturn.pollingMessage: Syncing the result with VNPay. Please wait a moment.
paymentReturn.fetchErrorMessage: We could not load this booking to check status. Try refreshing.
paymentReturn.waitingIpnMessage: VNPay confirmed your payment. We're updating the final status — this may take a few seconds.
paymentReturn.successMessage: Your booking has been fully paid. Our team will contact you to confirm the trip.

myBookings.title: My bookings
myBookings.subtitle: Manage tours you've booked — pay, cancel, or review details.
myBookings.errorMessage: Could not load bookings. Please retry.
